An earthquake occurring in the Mandala of Wind shakes the
earth to an extent of 200 Yojanas; one of the Fire Circle, 110
Yojanas; one of Varuna's, 180 Yojanas; and one of Indfa's, 160
Yojanas.

Should there be another earthquake on the 3rd, 4th or the 7th
day, or at the end of a month, fortnight or three fortnights, it would
cause the destruction of celebrated monarchs.
